summary: VitalFlow Iteration 9 - All 4 new features tested and verified. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed. Features verified: (1) Premium Trial 7 days - new registrations get is_premium=true and premium_expires_at 7 days in future, (2) Navbar 'Gestao' button now uses internal navigation (navigate('/gestor')) instead of external link, (3) Profile page cleaned - Setor and Cargo fields completely removed, only Nome, Data de Nascimento, Email, and Nivel de Acesso remain, (4) premium_expires_at field added to AuthResponse and returned by /api/auth/me.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts sizing issue on initial render, does not affect functionality

backend: POST /api/auth/register creates user with is_premium=true and premium_expires_at (7 days from now)
GET /api/auth/me returns premium_expires_at field for admin
GET /api/auth/me returns premium_expires_at field for trial user
GET /api/billing/plan returns correct plan for corporate admin
GET /api/billing/plan returns premium plan for trial user during trial period
frontend: Navbar 'Gestao' button is a <button> element (not <a> tag)
Navbar 'Gestao' button is visible for Gestor users (admin@vitalflow.com)
Navbar 'Gestao' button is NOT visible for non-Gestor users (trial@gmail.com)
Gestor page loads correctly with 'Painel do Gestor' title
Profile page shows Data de Nascimento field (editable)
Profile page shows Nivel de Acesso field
Profile page does NOT show Setor field
Profile page does NOT show Cargo field
Dashboard loads correctly for admin user with data
Dashboard shows empty state for trial user without data
Trial user shows PREMIUM badge in user menu

critical_code_review_comments: Premium Trial logic works: new users get is_premium=true with 7-day expiration
Navbar Gestao button correctly uses navigate('/gestor') for internal routing
Profile page correctly removed Setor and Cargo fields
premium_expires_at field correctly added to AuthResponse model and returned by API
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing trial@gmail.com user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow Iteration 9 - All 4 new features verified. (1) Premium Trial 7 days: POST /api/auth/register creates user with is_premium=true and premium_expires_at 7 days in future. GET /api/billing/plan auto-expires trial when premium_expires_at is past. (2) Navbar 'Gestao' button now uses navigate('/gestor') from react-router-dom instead of external link. Button is only visible for users with nivel_acesso='Gestor'. (3) Profile page cleaned: Setor and Cargo fields completely removed. Only Nome, Data de Nascimento, Email, and Nivel de Acesso remain. (4) premium_expires_at field added to Colaborador model and AuthResponse. Admin user (admin@vitalflow.com) has account_type='corporate' so premium is always true. Trial user (trial@gmail.com) has personal account with 7-day premium trial.
